items.title: Chelsea v West Ham United: Premier League – live

Anthony Taylor is the man in the middle. We’re ready to go. Warm-ups are done at the Bridge. Chelsea were harking back to the 90s with their training strip based on that notorious away kit. items.title: 'A great headache' - can Madueke stake claim for Arsenal and England?
items.summary: The sight of Noni Madueke flying past defenders and putting dangerous crosses into the penalty will have been a welcome sight for Mikel Arteta.

items.title: Kökcü en 'MVP' Cerny schieten Besiktas te hulp in 'Eredivisie-duel'
items.summary: Besiktas heeft zaterdagavond dankzij voormalig Eredivisionisten Orkun Kökcü en Vaclav Cerny drie punten overgehouden aan het thuisduel met Konyaspor. Ook bij de bezoekers was een speler met een verleden in de Eredivisie trefzeker.

items.title: Cucurella scores diving header to draw Chelsea level!
items.summary: Marc Cucurella scores a diving header to draw Chelsea level against West Ham in the Premier League.

items.title: VI Live: offensief van Chelsea heeft resultaat, Kostons zit Telstar dwars
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zaterdag 31 januari. Er staan drie duels in de Eredivisie op het programma, Liverpool krijgt bezoek van Newcastle United en de regerend kampioenen van Spanje, Duitsland en Italië komen in actie. Volg alle hoogtepunten in de VI Live.

items.title: Zorgen om aanvoerder overschaduwen welkome zege Napoli
items.summary: Napoli heeft een moeilijke week zaterdagavond afgesloten met een overwinning op Fiorentina. De zorgen van trainer Antonio Conte zijn echter nog niet voorbij, want aanvoerder Giovanni Di Lorenzo verliet het veld per brancard.

items.title: Liverpool v Newcastle United: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Premier League updates from the 8pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Top scorers | Follow on Bluesky It’s all change at Stamford Bridge, where Chelsea have made it 2-2 with 20 minutes to play. You can follow what is likely to be an eventful climax with Billy Munday. Milos Kerkez and Ibrahima Konate return to the Liverpool in place of Andy Robertson and the injured Jeremie Frimpong. The rest of the team is the same as against Qarabag in midweek. Continue reading...

items.title: 'Passionate' England set up netball decider in South Africa
items.summary: England bounced back from defeat to South Africa in their series opener by winning match two in Johannesburg to make Sunday's final fixture, live on Sky Sports YouTube, a decider.

items.title: 'It's De Bruyne like' | Fofana produces magic assist for Pedro goal
items.summary: Fofana produces magic assist to half Chelsea's deficit against West Ham in the Premier League.

items.title: Telefoon Schreuder stroomt vol: 'De mensen hebben genoten'
items.summary: De telefoon van Dick Schreuder stroomde na de indrukwekkende zege op AZ ( 1-3 ) vol met appjes van mensen die hadden genoten van het voetbal van NEC, maar zelf had de trainer daar wat meer moeite mee. Er gingen namelijk ook nog wel wat dingen fout in Alkmaar.

items.title: Positief blessurenieuws over Shaqueel van Persie: mogelijk nog minuten dit seizoen
items.summary: Feyenoord heeft een positieve medische update geplaatst over Shaqueel van Persie. Gevreesd werd voor een zware knieblessure nadat de zoon van trainer Robin van Persie geblesseerd was uitgevallen in het Europa League-duel met Real Betis, maar mogelijk maakt Van Persie junior dit seizoen nog minuten.

items.title: 'I've not got a crystal ball' - Edwards coy on Strand Larsen future
items.summary: Wolves manager Rob Edwards says that recruitment for his side has been difficult in January, whilst adding he is unsure about the future of striker Jorgen Strand Larsen.

items.title: Snoop Dogg wants to make Swansea 'global name'
items.summary: Swansea City investor Snoop Dogg has said he wants to take the side back to the Premier League, and establish them as a 'global name'.

items.title: Arbeloa wants Madrid fan support after UCL blow
items.summary: Real Madrid coach Alvaro Arbeloa said he doesn't expect the team's fans to voice their disapproval as they return to LaLiga action on Sunday

items.title: Arsenal thrash Leeds to reinstate 7-point PL lead
items.summary: Arsenal have reinstated their seven-point lead at the top of the Premier League after a 4-0 win against Leeds United.

items.title: Messi, CR7 jerseys headline Terry's $695K auction
items.summary: Former England and Chelsea captain John Terry netted $695,000 from a 50-item auction of his personal collection, headlined by match-worn Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo jerseys.

items.title: Wrexham boost PL promotion hopes with 1-0 win
items.summary: Wrexham moved back into the Championship play-off places after their hard- fought 1-0 win over Sheffield Wednesday at Hillsborough.

items.title: Arsenal showed character and quality in win at Leeds - Arteta
items.summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says he is pleased with the dominance, character and quality that his side showed in their 4-0 win over Leeds.

items.title: Iraola hails 'incredible' goalscoring teenager Kroupi
items.summary: Bournemouth manager Andoni Iraola credits much of his side's recent improvment to "incredible" performances of Eli Junior Kroupi, as well as the depth brought in by new signings.

items.title: Beto snatches last-gasp equaliser for Everton to spark Moyes sprint and frustrate Brighton
items.summary: David Moyes could not contain himself. As the ball hit the back of the net after the substitute Beto had bundled in the equaliser in the seventh minute of injury time, the Everton manager set off. Moyes is 63 in April, but he sprinted on to the pitch in a moment of sheer delight as Brighton’s players dropped to their knees in despair. Somehow, Everton’s unbeaten record here that stretches back to 2019 is still intact. It had seemed a goal from Pascal Gross would be enough for Brighton to claim victory at the sixth attempt after they had spurned a number of chances in the first half. But while it is one thing to plan how you are going to overcome a team managed by Moyes, it is not quite so easy in practice. Continue reading...
